name: Cream of Crab Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the bouillon cube in boiling water.
2. Cook the chopped onion in butter until it becomes tender.
3. Blend in the flour and seasonings (celery salt, 1 tablespoon salt, pepper).
4. Gradually add milk and the dissolved bouillon to the mixture.
5. Cook the sauce, stirring constantly, until it thickens.
6. Stir in the crabmeat and heat through.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
